competencies.name: Values Alignment
competencies.team_situation: During October vetting of London marketing agency for £25K automation contract, David suggested accepting partnership despite technical readiness concerns
competencies.emotional_reaction: felt uneasy but stayed silent, compromising my standards
competencies.outcome: Client later churned due to poor implementation
competencies.specificity_added: Timeline (October), project context (£25K contract), specific agency (London marketing agency), technical issue, outcome (churned)
competencies.values_dimension: Identifying what truly matters, living by those principles

competencies.name: Emotional Intelligence
competencies.team_situation: During late September weekly one-to-one, Harry critiqued delegation of client onboarding tasks, noting micromanagement of Sam's NHS outreach campaign work
competencies.outcome: Missed valuable insight, pattern limiting growth and damaging relationships
competencies.specificity_added: Meeting context (weekly one-to-one), timeline (late September), project (NHS outreach campaign), specific issue (micromanaging Sam), specific task (client onboarding)
competencies.values_dimension: Self-awareness, emotional regulation, feedback as gift

competencies.name: Mentoring Others
competencies.team_situation: Working with Sam on Q4 property sector campaign targeting 50 UK estate agencies, felt frustrated when tasks not done my way, realised hadn't taught thinking process
competencies.emotional_reaction: felt frustrated, then realised abdication not delegation
competencies.outcome: During mid-October review, Sam admitted guessing at strategy because no documented qualification criteria
competencies.specificity_added: Project (Q4 property sector outreach), target (50 UK estate agencies), meeting (mid-October review), Sam's feedback (guessing at strategy), root cause (never documented criteria)
competencies.values_dimension: Ethical responsibility to develop others, not abdication
competencies.exit_strategy_link: To scale operations beyond my personal capacity

competencies.name: Team Communication
competencies.team_situation: When proposed tiered partnership structure (bronze/silver/gold) during November strategy meeting, Leo challenged whether aligned with agency needs or desire for neat categorisation
competencies.emotional_reaction: felt dismissed and pushed harder with technical arguments
competencies.outcome: Turned collaboration into conflict, proposal stalled
competencies.specificity_added: Timeline (November), meeting context (strategy meeting), specific proposal (tiered structure with levels), Leo's exact challenge (neat categorisation vs agency needs), Leo's perspective (partner experience), outcome (proposal stalled)
competencies.values_dimension: Respect for diverse perspectives, collaboration over conflict

competencies.name: Service Design & Delivery
competencies.team_situation: When presented partnership model design at September planning session (self-service portal requiring agencies to configure automation stacks), David pointed out designed for convenience not agency needs
competencies.emotional_reaction: felt embarrassed but grateful he caught it early
competencies.specificity_added: Timeline (September), meeting context (planning session), specific model (self-service portal), technical requirement (agencies configure stacks), David's exact question ('When have you ever seen a busy agency owner complete complex technical setup?')

competencies.name: Financial Management
competencies.team_situation: During October budget review, Leo asked about pricing model for white-label automation services: 'What's our margin on typical £5K agency implementation?'
competencies.emotional_reaction: felt exposed because hadn't thought about it
competencies.outcome: Realised this is a hobby not a business, committed to value-capture thinking
competencies.specificity_added: Timeline (October), meeting context (budget review - differentiated from strategy meeting), service type (white-label automation), specific question (£5K implementation margin), specific gaps (no cost structure, no unit economics, no pricing strategy)
competencies.values_dimension: Ethical pricing, sustainable growth, value capture
